settings.heading: Performance
settings.subtext: The right upgrades for the way you drive - reliable, streetable and built around your goals and budget.

settings.title: Built To Your Goals
settings.text: Daily driver with a bit more, or a weekend weapon - we tailor the build to how you actually use the car.

settings.title: Reliable & Streetable
settings.text: Power is easy; power that lasts is the point. We keep it drivable and dependable.

settings.title: Supporting Mods Sorted
settings.text: Cooling, fuelling and tuning matched to the upgrades, so nothing gets left behind.

settings.heading: Get More Out Of Your Car
settings.body1: Get more out of your car with the right upgrades for the way you drive. From bolt-ons to tuning and supporting mods, we put together a package that is reliable, streetable and does what you actually want.
settings.body2: We'll talk through your goals and budget first, then build a combination that works together - not a shelf of parts that fight each other.
settings.points: Bolt-on upgrades & tuning | Intake, exhaust & cooling | Reliable, streetable setups | Built to your goals & budget
settings.strip_sub: Tell us your car and your goals, and we'll map out a package that suits.

settings.title: Book Your Car In
settings.copy: Send through your details and what you need, and we'll get back to you to book you in or track down a part.
